design_philosophy.emotion: Cinematic, mysterious, and authoritative. The dashboard should feel like a modern, high-tech Game Master's screen illuminated by candlelight. It blends dense data utility with narrative storytelling.
design_philosophy.spacing_strategy: Dense 'Control Room' grid for technical data (NPCs, User Mapping) mixed with generous 'Editorial' spacing for the transcription and script reading.
design_philosophy.contrast_strategy: Tactical Minimalism. Deep obsidian backgrounds with glowing amber accents for primary actions. 1px solid borders for separation instead of soft shadows.

layout_and_spacing.surface_treatment: Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle border (border-white/10), 4px to 8px border-radius (rounded-md). No heavy shadows, use inner glows or subtle border highlights on hover.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-aligned for all dense content (transcriptions, lists). Center alignment only for empty states or major modal headers.

header.style: Crystal Glass variant. backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0B0C10]/80 border-b border-white/10 sticky top-0 z-50
header.instructions: Must contain App Logo/Name, main navigation links (Sessions, Characters, Settings), and a User Profile avatar.

navigation_tabs.style: Shadcn Tabs customized. h-auto, transparent background for list, active tab gets a glowing bottom border (border-b-2 border-[#D4AF37]) or a tinted surface background.
navigation_tabs.instructions: Use tabs to switch between 'Transcription', 'Technical Diary', and 'Review Script' within a session view.

cards.style: Neumorphism avoided. Use 'Technical Grid' look: bg-[#13141A] border border-white/10 rounded-lg p-6.
cards.instructions: For Technical Diary items (NPCs, Locations, XP), use strict, dense cards. Include an icon (e.g., User, MapPin) at the top left of the card content.

badges.style: Rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider border
badges.instructions: Use heavily for IC/OOC tags, Processing Status (e.g., 'Transcribing...', 'Completed'), and Entity types (NPC, Item).

transcription_feed.instructions: IC (In-Character) text should be visually distinct (e.g., slightly larger, Playfair Display, or highlighted with a gold left-border). OOC (Out-of-Character) should be muted (#6C7280) and smaller. Include timestamps and character names for each block.

tables.style: Shadcn Table. border-collapse, subtle border-b on rows. Hover state: bg-[#1A1B23].
tables.instructions: Use for the Discord User -> Character mapping. Include Avatar, Discord Handle, Character Name, and Role.

icons.instructions: Use default lucide-react icons, but apply stroke-width of 1.5 for a sleeker, more refined look.

hero_background.description: Dark atmospheric tabletop RPG background with glowing 20-sided die and scattered parchment.
hero_background.usage: Use as a subtle blended background image for the Login screen or the main Empty State dashboard, set to opacity 10-20% behind the dark overlay.

texture_background.description: Abstract dark fantasy texture, subtle dragon scale pattern in deep onyx and charcoal.
texture_background.usage: Can be used as a repeating background or top-header texture for the application to break up the flat black color.

dice_accent_1.description: Close-up of a blue twenty-sided dice resting on a black background.
dice_accent_1.usage: Use for feature cards or session thumbnails if generic images are needed.

dice_accent_2.description: Artistic photo of multi-sided gaming dice in a blurred setting, highlighting the number 20.
dice_accent_2.usage: Use as a placeholder for Session cover images.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against the #13141A surface meets WCAG AA standards. Use #EDEDED for primary text. Avoid pure black or pure white.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have a clear focus state: focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D4AF37]/50 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-[#0B0C10].

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, table rows) MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case reflecting their role (e.g., data-testid='session-tab-transcription', data-testid='user-mapping-save-btn').
